seo.title: Mississippi Dental Assistant License (2026) | Requirements & Fees
seo.description: Complete guide to dental assistant requirements in Mississippi — fees, DANB certification, and radiography permits.
seo.keywords: dental assistant license mississippi, dental assistant certification mississippi, RDA mississippi, DANB CDA mississippi, dental assistant radiography mississippi

board.name: Mississippi State Board of Dental Examiners

license_types.title: Dental Assistant (no state license required)
license_types.description: No state-level credential required for general dental assistants in Mississippi.

steps.title: Meet Basic Requirements
steps.description: Ensure you meet the minimum requirements, such as being at least 18 years old and having a high school diploma or equivalent.

steps.title: Complete Required Training
steps.description: Complete training in Expanded Functions as a Dental Assistant (EFDA) if seeking EFDA registration or complete required training for other allowable duties.

steps.title: Apply for Registration
steps.description: Submit a complete application to the Mississippi State Board of Dental Examiners along with all required documentation.

documents.detail: Certificate from CODA-accredited program or documentation of on-the-job training hours.
Official CDA certification from the Dental Assisting National Board, if applicable.
Proof of radiography competency/certification required for taking x-rays.

provisional_text: Some states allow dental assistants to work under direct supervision while obtaining required certifications or completing training.
reciprocity_text: Mississippi does not require state licensure for general dental assistants. DANB national certification is recognized and recommended.

faqs.question: Does Mississippi require a dental assistant license?
faqs.answer: No, Mississippi does not require state licensure for general dental assistants. However, expanded functions and radiography may require permits or certifications.

faqs.question: Is DANB certification recognized in Mississippi?
faqs.answer: Yes, DANB CDA certification is recognized and often preferred by employers in Mississippi.

faqs.question: Can I take dental x-rays in Mississippi?
faqs.answer: Yes, but a radiography permit or certification is required.

faqs.question: How much does it cost to become a dental assistant in Mississippi?
faqs.answer: There is no state application fee for general dental assistants in Mississippi. However, DANB CDA exam costs $450, and radiography certifications may have additional fees.

reciprocity.notes: Mississippi does not license general dental assistants. DANB CDA or board-approved radiology course required for x-rays.

hero.title: Become a Dental Assistant in Mississippi
hero.dek: Mississippi Dental Assistant registration requires graduation from a CODA-accredited program for EFDA registration, documentation of training, and application to the Board.
